misc: Has a habit of getting lost on golf course grounds
Does not spit in the glass
biography: Janne, representing Revontuli Golf, has been a steadfast figure within the Hector Trophée, having participated in eight prior editions of this esteemed pair competition. As the Hector Trophée 2026 approaches, he will regrettably not be among the active competitors gracing the fairways, though his spirit remains deeply connected to the broader Hector community.

Throughout his extensive tenure on the challenging greens, Janne has consistently brought a spirit of earnest competition and admirable dedication. Despite his persistent endeavors across these eight ventures, the ultimate accolades – both the coveted Hector Trophée for his pairing and the prestigious individual Victor Trophy – have, to date, remained just beyond his grasp, underscoring the formidable competitive landscape of the event.

Beyond the scores, Janne is renowned for his generous disposition and an almost charming propensity for geographical misdirection, a quirk that has, on occasion, led to him finding himself quite literally off the beaten path on the golf course grounds. This amiable quality, however, is matched by an unwavering integrity; he is a competitor who truly "does not spit in the glass," always upholding the highest standards of sportsmanship and camaraderie, regardless of the pressures of competition.

While his absence from the upcoming tournament will be noted, Janne's continued active involvement in other Hector events signals an enduring passion for golf and the community it fosters. The golfing world anticipates his eventual return to this celebrated stage, eager to witness if his sustained efforts and distinctive character will culminate in a breakthrough victory in future editions.
